# Vagabond Config

**Disclaimer:** Documentation generated by an LLM.

Configs live in `SPT/user/mods/Vagabond/config/`. Restart the SPT server after edits — no hot reload. `//` comments OK.

| File | Purpose |
| --- | --- |
| `vagabond.json` | Core settings (this doc). |
| [`exfils/<raid>.json`](EXFILS.md) | Custom extracts + transits per raid. |
| [`static_transitions.json`](TRANSITIONS.md) | Landing spots for vanilla SPT transits. |
| [`trader_locations.json`](TRADERS.md) | Which extract unlocks which trader. |
| [Modder hotkeys](KEYBINDINGS.md) | Client-side `F8`/`F9`/`F10` dump hotkeys (BepInEx, not server JSON). |

## Raid names

`FactoryDay`, `FactoryNight`, `GroundZero`, `Streets`, `Woods`, `Customs`, `Interchange`, `Lighthouse`, `Reserve`, `Shoreline`, `Labs`, `Labyrinth`. Day/Night are separate raids.

---

## `vagabond.json`

Source: [Config.cs](../server/Config/Config.cs). Missing/invalid file → defaults below.

### Start

| Field | Default | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `StartingRoubles` | `175000` | Roubles for a fresh profile. |
| `StartRaid` | `"Streets"` | [Raid name](#raid-names). |
| `StartExfilIdentifier` | `"VGB_EXT_FENCE"` | Must match an `identifier` in `exfils/<StartRaid>.json`. |
| `WipeStashOnFirstRaidEntry` | `true` | First raid wipes leftover stash. |

### Death

| Field | Default | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `ResetOnDeath` | `false` | Wipe all stashes + gear on death. |
| `OnDeathGoTo` | `"hideout"` | `"hideout"` (falls back to `"stay"` if none), `"stay"`, or `"custom"`. |
| `OnDeathGoToRaid` | `""` | Required if `OnDeathGoTo="custom"`. |
| `OnDeathGoToExfilIdentifier` | `""` | Required if `OnDeathGoTo="custom"`. |
| `HealthOnDeath` | `0.0` | `1.0` = 100% limbs, `0.0` = game default. |
| `HealStatusEffectsOnDeath` | `true` | Clear bleeds/fractures on death. |

Custom respawn example:
```json
"OnDeathGoTo": "custom",
"OnDeathGoToRaid": "Customs",
"OnDeathGoToExfilIdentifier": "VGB_EXT_SKIER"
```

### Trader / economy

| Field | Default | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `EnableFenceChanges` | `true` | Reshape Fence into a useful starter vendor. |
| `DisableFlea` | `true` | Flea min level → 99. |
| `DisableEvents` | `true` | Disable Halloween etc. |
| `LimitTraderMailAccess` | `true` | Trader mail attachments only when their extract is reachable. |
| `MailAttachmentLimit` | `"same-exit"` | Player-to-player mail: `"same-exit"`, `"same-map"`, `"anywhere"`. |
| `AddFenceToHideout` | `false` | Fence always available from hideout. |
| `JoinHideout<Trader>LoyaltyLevel` | `2` | Loyalty needed to start the join-hideout quest. One per trader: `Therapist`, `Jaeger`, `Mechanic`, `Peacekeeper`, `Prapor`, `Ragman`, `Skier`. |

### Raid

| Field | Default | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `AdjustRaidTimeMins` | `60` | Minutes added to every raid timer. Negative shortens. |
| `EnablePickRaidLocation` | `false` | Let player pick any map (ignores location lock). |
| `EnableConsecutiveMapLootReduction` | `true` | Repeated raids on the same map shrink loot. Streak resets on a successful extract from a different map. Day+Night Factory share a streak. |
| `ConsecutiveMapLootReductionRate` | `0.5` | Multiplier per repeat. `0.5` → 100 / 50 / 25 / ... |
| `ConsecutiveMapLootReductionMin` | `0.05` | Floor (5 %). |

### Hideout

| Field | Default | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `AllowHideoutRelocation` | `false` | `true` → place freely (CTRL+P). `false` → relocation requires `Fresh Foundations` quest from Skier. |
| `HideoutRelocationFee` | `350000` | Roubles per relocation. |
| `ShareHideoutExits` | `false` | Other players' hideout exits also reach yours. |

### Stash

| Field | Default | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `EnableVirtualStashes` | `true` | Per-trader / per-hideout virtual stashes. Off → use the regular stash everywhere. |
| `WipeVirtualStashesOnRaidEntry` | `false` | Wipe virtual stashes on raid entry. **Disables `AllowPostRaidHealing`.** |
| `AllowPostRaidHealing` | `true` | Heal at Therapist post-raid (still costs money). |

### Gotchas

- `OnDeathGoTo="custom"` needs both `OnDeathGoToRaid` and `OnDeathGoToExfilIdentifier` set, and the identifier must exist in that raid's exfils file.
- `WipeVirtualStashesOnRaidEntry=true` silently overrides `AllowPostRaidHealing`.
